textPlain: I thought the bigger /32 prefix should be advertised from AS64511 to both AS13335 and AS64510.Is there free BGP peering for the purpose of only passing on the NLRIs?It's interesting that on the "open positions" page, the location filter appears to be strictly string matching, e.g. "US" does not cover "New York, US"
Interesting that this comment was added 9 days ago all of a sudden it pops up now with a 3hour stamp.
